commands.repair_reason: Needs maintainer judgment on fail-closed config write semantics and final upgrade/setup proof, not a narrow automated repair pass.; Cleared: The diff changes secrets/config refresh ordering but does not add dependencies, broaden permissions, or introduce a concrete supply-chain or credential exposure issue. commands.review_summary:
The branch adds runtime SecretRef preflight before root and single-file include config writes, reuses the prepared snapshot during refresh, and rolls back file/env state on post-commit refresh failure.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main commits root/include writes before runtime refresh can reject unresolved active SecretRefs, and the existing gateway-auth integration test expects the bad SecretRef to remain persisted after the refresh failure.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer judgment on fail-closed config write semantics and final upgrade/setup proof, not a narrow automated repair pass.
